About Us

M/s ZEN SCIENTIFIC is a scientific enterprise registered under MSME, Government of India, and based in Nangtan Village, Tizit, Mon District, Nagaland. We are dedicated to promoting scientific learning, research, innovation and community engagement through practical education and experiential training. Our activities focus on internships, workshops, science camps, laboratory visits and hands-on scientific programmes for students, while fostering curiosity, leadership and lifelong learning.

Our Facilities

🔬 Laboratory Facilities

Basic laboratory facilities for student training, demonstrations, practical sessions and introductory scientific experiments in biology, environmental science and related disciplines.

🎓 Training Hall

Classroom facilities with projector, seating arrangements and learning spaces for workshops, internships, science camps and educational programmes.

🏠 Accommodation

Accommodation facilities for boys and girls participating in internships, training programmes, workshops and educational events.

Internship Programmes Offered

🎓 Science & Technical Internships

  • Field Biology and Laboratory Techniques Internship

Suitable for: B.Sc., M.Sc., Agriculture students, Environmental Science students and Life Science students.

🌐 Multidisciplinary Internships

  • Leadership, Community Engagement, and Event Management Internship

Suitable for: BA, BBA, B.Com., Education, English, Sociology, Theology students and other interested learners.

🔬 Programmes for School Students (Class 5–12)

  • Laboratory Visits & Hands-on Scientific Experiments
  • Summer Science Camps and Science Popularisation Programmes

Events

Summer Science Camp 2024

First Edition | 24–27 July 2024
Nangtan Village, Tizit, Mon District, Nagaland

The First Edition of Summer Science Camp 2024 brought together 37 participants from different parts of Mon District and included scientific demonstrations, practical activities, lectures and interactive learning experiences.
